test_name: Happy path — BM triggers eligibility, LOS returns success
preconditions: Lead with id='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111001' exists in stage='qualified'
Consent record exists for purpose='product_eligibility' for this lead
No prior eligibility_snapshots row exists for this lead
LosMockAdapter returns success response with indicative eligibility data
BM-001 is authenticated with valid JWT and has branch_id='BR-001'
test_steps: Authenticate as BM-001 (role=BM, branch_id='BR-001') and obtain JWT
POST /api/v1/leads/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111001/eligibility with BM JWT and header Idempotency-Key: IK-ELIG-HP-001
Assert HTTP response status is 200
Assert body.data.eligibility_status = 'received'
Assert body.data.is_indicative = true
Assert body.data.amount is a positive number
Query eligibility_snapshots WHERE lead_id='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111001' — expect exactly 1 row with status='received'
Query integration_logs WHERE lead_id='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111001' AND kind='eligibility_request' — expect status='success'
Query leads WHERE id='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111001' — expect stage='eligibility_requested'
Query event_outbox WHERE payload->>'lead_id'='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111001' AND event_type='ELIGIBILITY_RECEIVED' — expect 1 row
Query stage_history WHERE lead_id='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111001' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 — expect to_stage='eligibility_requested'
expected_result: HTTP 200; body.data.eligibility_status='received'; body.data.is_indicative=true; lead.stage='eligibility_requested'; 1 eligibility_snapshots row with status='received'; 1 integration_logs row with status='success'; 1 event_outbox row with event_type='ELIGIBILITY_RECEIVED'; stage_history updated; API envelope shape {data, meta, error}
postconditions: Exactly 1 eligibility_snapshots row for this lead with status='received'
Exactly 1 integration_logs row for this lead with kind='eligibility_request' and status='success'

test_name: LOS timeout — eligibility_status=pending, retry enqueued
preconditions: Lead with id='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111002' exists in stage='qualified'
LosMockAdapter fixture configured to simulate 30s timeout
No prior eligibility_snapshots row for this lead
test_steps: Configure LosMockAdapter with fixture='timeout' (simulates 30-second timeout)
Authenticate as BM-001 and obtain JWT
POST /api/v1/leads/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111002/eligibility with BM JWT
Assert HTTP response status is 200 (non-blocking; request accepted)
Assert body.data.eligibility_status = 'pending'
Query integration_logs WHERE lead_id='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111002' — expect status IN ('pending','retrying')
Query leads WHERE id='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111002' — expect stage='eligibility_requested'
Query event_outbox WHERE event_type='ELIGIBILITY_RECEIVED' AND payload->>'lead_id'='11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111002' — expect 0 rows
Verify Cloud Task / retry queue has an enqueued job for this lead's eligibility retry
expected_result: HTTP 200; body.data.eligibility_status='pending'; integration_logs.status IN ('pending','retrying'); lead.stage='eligibility_requested'; no ELIGIBILITY_RECEIVED event in event_outbox; Cloud Task enqueued for retry
postconditions: Retry job present in Cloud Tasks queue

Assert the INSERT fails with a foreign key constraint violation
Run invariant query to confirm 0 orphan snapshots
expected_result: INSERT fails with FK violation; invariant query returns 0

di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eligibility_snapshots es LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.id = es.lead_id WHERE l.id IS NULL

test_name: No duplicate idempotency_key in integration_logs
preconditions: integration_logs table has UNIQUE INDEX on idempotency_key WHERE idempotency_key IS NOT NULL
test_steps: INSERT first integration_logs row with idempotency_key='IK-TEST-DUP' and status='success'
Attempt INSERT second integration_logs row with idempotency_key='IK-TEST-DUP' and status='failed'
Assert second INSERT fails with unique constraint violation
Run invariant query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM integration_logs WHERE idempotency_key='IK-TEST-DUP' — expect 1
expected_result: Second INSERT fails with unique constraint violation; exactly 1 row with idempotency_key='IK-TEST-DUP' remains

di_meta.action: INSERT INTO integration_logs (lead_id, kind, idempotency_key, status, created_at) VALUES ('11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111001', 'eligibility_request', 'IK-TEST-DUP', 'failed', NOW())
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM integration_logs WHERE idempotency_key='IK-TEST-DUP'

test_name: Duplicate LOS application blocked by unique index on concurrent retry

Query integration_logs WHERE lead_id={id} AND kind='los_handoff' AND status='success' — assert exactly 1 row
expected_result: HTTP 409; body.error.code='CONFLICT'; no duplicate los_application_id inserted in los_application_mirrors; exactly 1 success row in integration_logs for this lead's handoff

test_name: Valid HMAC webhook — LOS mirror created with correct status
preconditions: Lead '33333333-3333-3333-3333-333333333001' is in stage='handed_off' with los_application_id='LOS-APP-001'
No existing los_application_mirrors row for LOS-APP-001
HMAC shared secret known for signature generation
test_steps: Compute valid HMAC-SHA256 signature of webhook body using shared secret
POST /los/webhooks/status with body {los_application_id:'LOS-APP-001', status:'under_review', status_date:'2026-06-17T10:00:00Z', event_id:'EVT-001'} and header X-LOS-Signature: <computed_sig>
Assert HTTP response status is 200
Query los_application_mirrors WHERE los_application_id='LOS-APP-001' — expect 1 row with status='under_review', status_date='2026-06-17T10:00:00Z', received_via='webhook'
Query integration_logs WHERE lead_id='33333333-3333-3333-3333-333333333001' AND kind='los_webhook' — expect status='success'
expected_result: HTTP 200; los_application_mirrors row with status='under_review', status_date='2026-06-17T10:00:00Z', received_via='webhook'; integration_logs row with status='success'

test_name: Out-of-order delivery — older status_date ignored, current mirror unchanged
preconditions: los_application_mirrors row exists for LOS-APP-001 with status='approved', status_date='2026-06-17T12:00:00Z'
test_steps: Compute valid HMAC-SHA256 signature
POST /los/webhooks/status with body {los_application_id:'LOS-APP-001', status:'under_review', status_date:'2026-06-17T09:00:00Z', event_id:'EVT-002'} (older status_date)
Assert HTTP response status is 200 (acknowledged)
Query los_application_mirrors WHERE los_application_id='LOS-APP-001' — assert status still='approved' and status_date still='2026-06-17T12:00:00Z'
Query integration_logs for EVT-002 — expect 1 row recorded (for audit trail)
expected_result: HTTP 200; los_application_mirrors.status remains 'approved'; los_application_mirrors.status_date remains '2026-06-17T12:00:00Z'; out-of-order event logged in integration_logs

test_name: Invalid HMAC signature — 403 FORBIDDEN, no database writes

Assert HTTP response status is 403
Assert body.error.code = 'FORBIDDEN'
Query los_application_mirrors WHERE los_application_id='LOS-APP-001' — assert no new row with status='approved' (status unchanged from pre-test)
Query integration_logs for EVT-003 — expect 0 rows (no write on auth failure)
expected_result: HTTP 403; body.error.code='FORBIDDEN'; no los_application_mirrors write; no integration_logs write

test_name: No two los_application_mirrors rows with same los_application_id
preconditions: los_application_mirrors has UNIQUE constraint on los_application_id
test_steps: INSERT first los_application_mirrors row with los_application_id='LOS-DI-001' and status='under_review'
Attempt INSERT second los_application_mirrors row with los_application_id='LOS-DI-001' and status='approved'

expected_result: Second INSERT fails with unique constraint violation; exactly 1 row with los_application_id='LOS-DI-001' remains

di_meta.setup_sql: INSERT INTO los_application_mirrors (los_application_id, status, status_date, received_via, created_at) VALUES ('LOS-DI-001', 'under_review', NOW(), 'webhook', NOW())

test_name: Happy path — partner submits lead successfully
preconditions: PARTNER-001 authenticated with valid PARTNER JWT (partner_id='PP-001')
test_steps: Authenticate as PARTNER-001 (role=PARTNER, partner_id='PP-001') and obtain JWT
POST /api/v1/partners/leads with body {applicant_name:'Ravi Kumar', mobile:'9123456789', product_id:'PROD-001', loan_amount:150000, source:'DSA'} and header Idempotency-Key: IK-P-001
Assert HTTP response status is 201
Assert body.data.lead_id is a non-empty UUID
Assert body.data.stage = 'captured'
Assert body.data.applicant_name is masked (e.g., 'R*** K***' or similar masking pattern, NOT 'Ravi Kumar')
Assert body response does NOT contain raw mobile '9123456789'
Query source_attributions WHERE lead_id=<returned_lead_id> — expect 1 row with partner_id='PP-001' and source='DSA'
Query event_outbox WHERE event_type='LEAD_CREATED' AND payload->>'lead_id'=<returned_lead_id> — expect 1 row
Query leads WHERE id=<returned_lead_id> — expect stage='captured'
expected_result: HTTP 201; body.data.lead_id is UUID; body.data.stage='captured'; applicant_name masked; no raw mobile in response; source_attributions row with partner_id='PP-001'; LEAD_CREATED event in event_outbox

test_name: Suspended partner blocked — 403 FORBIDDEN with generic message
preconditions: PARTNER-002 authenticated with valid PARTNER JWT (partner_id='PP-002')
test_steps: Authenticate as PARTNER-002 (role=PARTNER, partner_id='PP-002') and obtain JWT
POST /api/v1/partners/leads with any valid lead body
Assert HTTP response status is 403
Assert body.error.code = 'FORBIDDEN'
Assert body.error.message does NOT reveal the word 'suspended' or internal suspension reason
Query leads — expect 0 new rows created by this request
expected_result: HTTP 403; body.error.code='FORBIDDEN'; generic error message (no internal reason text exposed); no lead created

test_name: Strong duplicate blocked — 409 with no PII leaked
preconditions: Lead already exists with mobile='9999999999' constituting a strong duplicate match
PARTNER-001 authenticated with valid PARTNER JWT
test_steps: Authenticate as PARTNER-001 and obtain JWT
POST /api/v1/partners/leads with body {mobile:'9999999999', applicant_name:'Another Applicant', product_id:'PROD-001', loan_amount:100000, source:'DSA'}
Assert HTTP response status is 409
Assert body.error.code = 'DUPLICATE_BLOCKED'
Assert response body does NOT contain any matched lead_id
Assert response body does NOT contain any owner name or assignee details
Assert response body does NOT contain any other partner information
Assert response body does NOT contain applicant_name from the matched lead
Query leads — expect no new lead created for mobile='9999999999' by this request
expected_result: HTTP 409; body.error.code='DUPLICATE_BLOCKED'; response body contains NO matched lead_id, NO owner/assignee name, NO other partner info, NO applicant name from matched lead; no new lead created
postconditions: No new lead created for this mobile

Assert body.data.lead_id is a non-empty UUID
Assert body.data.duplicate_status = 'flagged'
Query leads WHERE id=<returned_lead_id> — expect duplicate_status='flagged'
expected_result: HTTP 201; lead created; body.data.duplicate_status='flagged'; no blocking error returned

test_name: Rate limit — 61st POST within 60s window returns 429
preconditions: PARTNER-001 authenticated with valid PARTNER JWT
Rate limiter configured to 60 POSTs/min per PARTNER JWT
test_steps: Authenticate as PARTNER-001 and obtain JWT
Send 60 POST /api/v1/partners/leads requests within a 60-second window
Assert all 60 requests return 201
Send the 61st POST /api/v1/partners/leads within the same 60-second window
Assert HTTP response status is 429
Assert body.error.code = 'RATE_LIMITED'
expected_result: HTTP 429 on 61st request; body.error.code='RATE_LIMITED'; first 60 requests succeed
postconditions: Rate limit counter resets after window expires

test_name: Idempotent replay — same idempotency_key returns original lead
preconditions: Lead already created for PARTNER-001 with idempotency_key='IK-P-001'; lead_id is known
PARTNER-001 authenticated with valid PARTNER JWT
test_steps: Note pre-request COUNT(*) from leads, source_attributions, event_outbox
Authenticate as PARTNER-001 and obtain JWT

POST /api/v1/partners/leads with body {applicant_name:'Ravi Kumar', mobile:'9123456789', product_id:'PROD-001', loan_amount:150000, source:'DSA'} and header Idempotency-Key: IK-P-001 (same key as original)
Assert HTTP response status is 201 or 200
Assert body.data.lead_id equals the original lead_id
Query leads — assert COUNT unchanged
Query source_attributions for this lead — assert COUNT unchanged
Query event_outbox for LEAD_CREATED event for this lead — assert COUNT unchanged
expected_result: HTTP 201 or 200; same lead_id returned; no new leads row; no new source_attributions row; no new event_outbox row

test_name: Inline validation errors on partner submission form
test_steps: Log in as PARTNER-001 (role=PARTNER)
Navigate to /partner-portal/leads/new on viewport 1280x800
Wait for form to render
Enter 'ABCD123456' (10 chars non-digit) in getByLabel('Mobile') field
Click getByRole('button', {name: 'Submit Lead'})
Assert getByRole('alert') or inline error visible with message 'Invalid mobile number'
Assert Submit button is disabled during submission
Verify error message is linked via aria-describedby to the mobile input
Verify error summary has role=alert
Resize viewport to 375x667 (mobile)
Repeat validation — assert inline error still visible and accessible on mobile
Enter a valid 10-digit mobile number
Assert inline error clears when valid input entered
expected_result: Inline error 'Invalid mobile number' shown below mobile field; button disabled during submission; error linked via aria-describedby; error summary has role=alert; error clears on valid input; functional at both viewports
postconditions: No lead submitted with invalid data

visual_assert: Error message 'Invalid mobile number' inline below mobile field

test_name: Every DSA/Dealer channel lead has partner_id in source_attributions
preconditions: TC-FR091-01 run to create a DSA lead
test_steps: Trigger TC-FR091-01 (partner submits DSA lead)
Run invariant query against source_attributions and leads
Assert query returns 0 rows
expected_result: Invariant query returns 0 — no DSA or Dealer leads exist without a partner_id in source_attributions

di_meta.setup_sql: -- Trigger TC-FR091-01 to create partner-submitted lead
di_meta.action: POST /api/v1/partners/leads (via TC-FR091-01); then run invariant query
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads l JOIN source_attributions sa ON sa.lead_id = l.id WHERE sa.source IN ('DSA','Dealer') AND sa.partner_id IS NULL

test_name: BM retrieves quality score for own-branch partner

Assert body.data.metrics.total_leads = 15
Assert body.data.factors is a non-empty array
expected_result: HTTP 200; body.data.quality_score integer 0-100; body.data.insufficient_data=false; body.data.metrics.total_leads=15; body.data.factors array present

expected_result: HTTP 200; body.data.metrics.document_quality_index=null (strict null, not 0); quality_score computed from non-null factors

test_name: Formula correctness — deterministic numeric verification against known distribution
preconditions: Partner 'PP-005' exists with known deterministic lead distribution: 15 total leads, 10 contactable (contacted or later stage), 1 duplicate (duplicate_status='flagged' or 'linked'), 2 rejected, 10 kyc_pass (kyc_status IN ('success','waived')), 8 handed_off
test_steps: Authenticate as BM-001 and obtain JWT
GET /api/v1/partners/PP-005/quality with BM JWT
Assert HTTP response status is 200
Assert body.data.quality_score = 64 (raw=63.5 rounded per §12.4 formula)
Assert body.data.factors is an array where individual factor values match the known lead distribution
Manually verify each factor against formula: contactability_rate=10/15, duplicate_rate=1/15, rejection_rate=2/15, kyc_pass_rate=10/15, conversion_rate=8/15
expected_result: HTTP 200; body.data.quality_score=64 (raw 63.5 rounded per §12.4); body.data.factors verifiable against formula inputs

GET /api/v1/partners/PP-001/quality?from=2026-01-01&to=2026-03-31 with BM JWT
Assert HTTP response status is 200

Assert body.data.metrics does not include Apr-Jun leads
expected_result: HTTP 200; body.data.metrics.total_leads=10; only Jan-Mar 2026 leads counted

test_name: FR-092 is read-only — no stage_history or audit_logs rows written
test_steps: Query MAX(id) from stage_history — capture as max_stage_history_id
Query MAX(id) from audit_logs — capture as max_audit_logs_id
Authenticate as BM-001 and obtain JWT
GET /api/v1/partners/PP-001/quality with BM JWT
Assert HTTP response status is 200
Run invariant query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stage_history WHERE id > <max_stage_history_id> — expect 0
Run invariant query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE id > <max_audit_logs_id> — expect 0
expected_result: GET /quality does not insert any rows into stage_history or audit_logs; both invariant queries return 0

di_meta.setup_sql: SELECT MAX(id) AS max_stage_history_id FROM stage_history; SELECT MAX(id) AS max_audit_logs_id FROM audit_logs;
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stage_history WHERE id > :max_stage_history_id; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE id > :max_audit_logs_id;
